message:
polish: add animated counters + keyboard nav from viz skill

REVELATION beat counter reveal:
- animateCounter() using easeOutExpo (1-2^(-10t)) over 1.2-1.5s
- Benchmark ops/sec counts up from 0 to final value instead of
  snapping — the "aha" moment becomes a 1.5s dramatic reveal

Keyboard navigation (MOBILE-DESKTOP.md):
- Outcome cards now have tabindex="0" + role="button"
- Arrow keys (left/right/up/down) cycle between Ok/Err/Cancelled/
  Panicked cards, triggering selection
- Enter/Space activate the focused card
- focus-visible ring already styled via CSS

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
